tasks.subject: Task 1: Add convertToSshUrl to gitParsing.ts with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A tested, pure function that converts an HTTPS remote URL to SSH format for a given target host, returning null when no rewrite is needed or the URL is unrecognised.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/services/gitParsing.ts`
- Modify: `src/test/gitParsing.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `convertToSshUrl('https://github.com/org/repo.git', 'github.com')` returns `'git@github.com:org/repo.git'`
- [ ] `convertToSshUrl('git@github.com:org/repo.git', 'github.com')` returns `null`
- [ ] `convertToSshUrl('https://github.com/org/repo.git', 'git.company.com')` returns `'git@git.company.com:org/repo.git'`
- [ ] `convertToSshUrl('ssh://git@github.com/org/repo.git', 'github.com')` returns `null`
- [ ] All tests pass: `npm run test`

**Verify:** `npm run test` â†’ output includes convertToSshUrl tests with no failures

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/services/gitParsing.ts", "src/test/gitParsing.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["convertToSshUrl converts HTTPS to SSH", "convertToSshUrl returns null for already-SSH URLs", "convertToSshUrl returns null for unrecognised formats", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add sshPull method and register four commands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A shared `sshPull` private method in `CommandController` that drives the remote-picker â†’ optional hostname-input â†’ URL-rewrite â†’ pull flow; plus four registered VS Code commands that call it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/commands/commandController.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Import `convertToSshUrl` from `../services/gitParsing` added
- [ ] `private async sshPull(targetHost: string | 'prompt'): Promise<void>` method exists
- [ ] Four commands registered: `vscodeGitClient.git.sshPull.github`, `.gitlab`, `.bitbucket`, `.custom`
- [ ] `npm run compile` passes with no errors

**Verify:** `npm run compile` â†’ exits 0, no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/commands/commandController.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run compile", "acceptanceCriteria": ["convertToSshUrl imported", "sshPull method implemented", "four register() calls added", "no TypeScript errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire up quick actions and declare commands in package.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The four SSH pull commands appear in the Quick Actions picker and in the VS Code command palette.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/commands/commandController.ts` (quick actions entries)
- Modify: `package.json` (command declarations)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Four new entries in `openQuickActions()` after 'Pull with preview'
- [ ] Four command declarations in `package.json` under `contributes.commands`
- [ ] `npm run test` passes with no failures

**Verify:** `npm run test` â†’ exits 0, all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/commands/commandController.ts", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four quick action entries added", "four package.json command declarations added", "all tests pass"]}
```
